G

game - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
 
game - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
 
Game - Class in com.example.battleship.model
Orchestrates one full match: the two players, whose turn it is, and the rule that a hit or a sunk ship grants another shot while a miss passes the turn (HU-2).
Game(String, ShootingStrategy) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.Game
 
GAME_FILE - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.persistence.SavedGameRepository
 
GAME_OVER - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.controller.GamePhase
Someone has won; the result overlay is showing.
Game.ShotOutcome - Record Class in com.example.battleship.model
The position targeted and the result of one resolved shot, returned by Game.playMachineShot() since -- unlike Game.fireAtMachine(Position) -- the caller doesn't already know which position the machine chose.
gameOverLabel - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
gameOverPane - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
GamePhase - Enum Class in com.example.battleship.controller
Which phase the single main screen is currently showing.
GamePhase() - Constructor for enum class com.example.battleship.controller.GamePhase
 
GameScreenController - Class in com.example.battleship.controller
The controller behind main-view.fxml: the single screen the whole game runs on.
GameScreenController() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController

getDepthInRows() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.ship.Ship
How many rows this ship's footprint spans: its full size when Orientation.VERTICAL, just 1 when Orientation.HORIZONTAL.

getWidthInColumns() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.ship.Ship
How many columns this ship's footprint spans: its full size when Orientation.HORIZONTAL, just 1 when Orientation.VERTICAL.
getWinner() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Game
 
grantsAnotherTurn() - Method in enum class com.example.battleship.model.player.ShotResult
Whether this result grants the shooter another turn, per the project rules: a miss passes the turn, a hit or a sunk ship does not.
